designIntent: Production-grade, niche minimalistic SaaS dashboard. No mock/random components, no 'student project' feel. Every screen must read like a real industrial compliance product: dense, calm, high-contrast, purposeful whitespace. Reference: dark navy sidebar + mint accent compliance dashboard (Live View / Scheduler / Analytics) and the dark-green split-screen auth screen for sign-in/sign-up.

frontend.styling: Vanilla CSS with CSS Custom Properties (design tokens) — no Tailwind
frontend.authentication: Clerk (Next.js integration), custom-themed to match brand, not default Clerk UI
frontend.database: PostgreSQL via Drizzle ORM (7 tables) — replace JSON file store with real DB reads/writes

designSystem.principle: One dark surface (sidebar + hero/CTA elements), one light surface (app canvas + cards). Mint/teal is the ONLY accent color used for active states, primary data, and success. Everything else is grayscale + semantic red/amber for alerts.
designSystem.spacing: 8px base unit, 24px page gutter, 16px card gutter
designSystem.iconography: Lucide icons only, 18-20px stroke width 1.75, no filled emoji-style icons

animations.livePulse: pulse-dot 2s ease-in-out infinite (used ONLY on true live/active session indicators)
animations.transition: 180ms ease for hover/focus, 300ms ease for panel/modal transitions

antiPatterns: No purple/blue gradients unrelated to brand
No mixed languages on the same surface — all UI copy in English unless locale switch is explicitly built
No placeholder/mock data left visible in production build — empty states must be designed, not blank

routing.middleware: Clerk middleware protecting all routes except /sign-in* and /sign-up*. Fix known conflict: keep ONLY the catch-all routes app/sign-in/[[...sign-in]] and app/sign-up/[[...sign-up]]; remove the duplicate (auth) group pages.
routing.postAuthRedirect: afterSignInUrl='/' and afterSignUpUrl='/' so both flows land on the Dashboard

(auth).layout: Full-bleed two-pane split screen, no app shell, no sidebar/topbar

(dashboard).layout: Persistent dark sidebar (fixed width 260px) + light canvas with top bar (page title, global search, notification bell, alerts icon, help icon, emergency-stop button on data-heavy pages)

removedOrMerged: /pressure placeholder removed — merged into /live as the two-position monitoring grid
/recommendations merged into session detail as a 'Clinical Guidance' panel, not a standalone nav item
/reports renamed /logs conceptually but keeps DOCX generation; report list becomes 'Unit Logs' export panel

/sign-in.reference: Image 1 — split screen, wordmark top-left, 'Welcome back' heading, email/password fields with 8px-radius inputs, dark full-width primary button, link to sign-up below
/sign-in.leftPane: White background, brand wordmark, Clerk <SignIn/> restyled via appearance prop to match input/button tokens above
/sign-in.rightPane: Dark gradient (authGradient) panel with large Manrope display headline about compliance/monitoring value prop, and a floating summary card mimicking the app's live compliance score (mint ring, %, 'OPTIMAL' pill) instead of a payments card

/sign-up.fields: Clerk <SignUp/> — email, password, org/unit name if multi-tenant

/.name: Dashboard (Supervisor Overview)
/.reference: Image 2 layout pattern adapted for a landing/overview instead of pure live view
components: MetricStrip (Sessions today / Active alerts / Missed tasks)

/live.name: Live View
/live.reference: Image 2 exactly — top bar tabs (Live View / Unit Logs / Equipment), Active Session hero bar with elapsed timer, two POSITION cards each with camera feed thumbnail + PROCESS COMPLIANCE checklist (TASK-01..06 renamed Pre-cleaning/Stripping/Machine attachment/Milking/Detachment/Post-dip), status badges (checked/skipped/pending/in-progress spinner), OVERRIDE & FLAG INCIDENT button on violation state, right-hand Recent Alerts Log panel with compliance score gauge/progress bar at bottom

/logs.name: Unit Logs
/logs.description: Replaces old /alerts — full alert/audit history table: severity, cow ID, task, timestamp, clip link, dismiss/override actions. Filter by severity/date/employee.

/equipment.name: Equipment
/equipment.description: Sensor/camera health, inference-service connection status (was 'SystemStatusCard' on /monitoring), calibration log, model version + accuracy badge

/analytics.name: Analytics
/analytics.reference: Image 4 exactly — reporting period + cow position filter + 'Download Full Report (.docx)' button in top bar, System Compliance Score donut (mint ring, %, OPTIMAL/AT RISK/CRITICAL pill), Missed Task Frequency stacked bar chart (Completed mint / Missed amber) per task type, Operational Efficiency horizontal bar list (avg task duration vs benchmark), Human Factors staff compliance table (employee, compliance %, avg speed, status pill: TOP PERFORMER/STABLE/REVIEW REQ./HIGH SPEED), dark 'Predictive Compliance Logic' insight banner at bottom with CTA

/scheduler.name: Scheduler
/scheduler.description: List of upcoming/past sessions in NavCard rows, primary 'New Session' button (dark, top of sidebar as in Image 3)

/scheduler/new.name: Schedule New Session
/scheduler/new.reference: Image 3 exactly — numbered step pills (1 Timing / 2 Herd Details / 3 Assignment / 4 Review) with connecting line, dark filled circle for active step, light gray circles for upcoming steps, card body with labeled inputs (uppercase label style), inline info callout with left accent border, single right-aligned 'Continue →' primary button

/sessions/[sessionId].name: Session Detail
/sessions/[sessionId].description: Full task checklist + cow process status + clinical guidance panel (former /recommendations content) + employee reassignment + audit trail

/settings.name: Settings
/settings.description: Supervisor profile (matches sidebar footer avatar pattern from Images 2-4), clinical threshold slider (20-60), notification toggle with live status dot

/settings/patient.name: Patient/Herd Settings
/settings/patient.description: Per-cow/herd metadata configuration, no longer a bare placeholder — table of registered cow IDs with tag/RFID, position assignment

layout.Sidebar: Fixed dark navy (sidebarBg), wordmark + unit subtitle top, nav items with icon+label, active item = mint pill background with dark text, 'New Session' dark button pinned above footer, user profile card (avatar, name, role) pinned to bottom — matches Images 2-4 exactly
layout.TopBar: White, 1px bottom border, page/section title left, tab-style secondary nav if applicable, global search input (icon-left, gray-50 bg, 8px radius), notification bell, alert icon, help icon, optional red 'Emergency Stop' pill button on Analytics/Live pages

shared.Button: Primary = dark navy bg, white text, 10px radius. Secondary = white bg, 1px border, dark text. Danger = filled danger red, used only for override/flag/emergency actions.
shared.Input: 1px border, 8px radius, 14px text, focus ring in accentBright at 30% opacity
shared.Label: Uppercase 11px 600-weight textMuted, letter-spacing 0.06em
shared.StatusPill: Pill radius, semantic soft bg + solid text color: success/warning/danger/neutral variants
shared.ProgressRing: SVG donut, mint stroke on gray-200 track, center % + status pill, used for compliance score
shared.StackedBarChart: Two-tone bars (accent + warning) per category, used for missed-task frequency
shared.DataTable: Left-aligned uppercase-label header row, zebra-free, row hover = canvas tint, status column uses StatusPill

dashboard.LiveSessionBanner: Live indicator = small mint dot with livePulse animation + 'Active' label, session elapsed timer (large Manrope numerals, '/' total), assigned operator + throughput stat
dashboard.PositionMonitorCard: Dark video-frame header bar with position label + status pill (MILKING mint / VIOLATION danger), thumbnail feed with ROI overlay box, PROCESS COMPLIANCE checklist below (check icon mint / skip icon danger / spinner in-progress / empty circle pending), OVERRIDE & FLAG INCIDENT full-width danger button appears only when a violation state is present
dashboard.TaskChecklist: 6 milking tasks (Pre-cleaning, Stripping, Machine attachment, Milking, Detachment, Post-dip), status badge + inline duration, override affordance per row
dashboard.OverrideModal: Centered modal, task status select (completed/missed/anomaly_flagged/unverifiable), reason textarea, posts to /api/task-events/[id]/override
dashboard.RecentAlertsLog: Right rail card, timestamped entries with colored left border by severity, VIEW CLIP / DISMISS inline actions, compliance score progress bar pinned at bottom of the card

scheduler.StepIndicator: 4-step numbered pill row with connecting line, matches Image 3 styling precisely
scheduler.MultiStepSessionForm: Step 1 Timing (start/end datetime pickers + buffer info callout), Step 2 Herd Details (cow count, position assignment), Step 3 Assignment (operator picker), Step 4 Review (summary card + confirm)

analytics.ComplianceScoreDonut: Mint ring donut, center %, status pill (OPTIMAL/AT RISK/CRITICAL), completed/missed totals below
analytics.MissedTaskBarChart: 6 categories (Pre-Dip, Stripping, Dry Wipe, Attachment, Alignment, Post-Dip), stacked completed(mint)/missed(amber), legend top-right
analytics.EfficiencyBarList: Horizontal progress bars per task phase with benchmark tick + current value label
analytics.StaffComplianceTable: Employee avatar, name, compliance %, avg speed per cycle, status pill
analytics.PredictiveInsightBanner: Full-width dark navy card, insight copy, secondary 'Review Protocol Changes' button, small stat tiles (Sensor Health, Network Sync) right-aligned

reports.ReportGenerator: Client component calling POST /api/reports/generate, styled as the 'Download Full Report (.docx)' dark button pattern from Image 4, shows recent report list below

/api/events/ingest.POST: Ingest events from inference service, Bearer token auth, rate limited 120/min, publishes to broadcast

/api/task-events/[taskEventId]/override.PATCH: Manual override with reason, creates audit log

/api/reports/generate.POST: Generate DOCX report, returns file URL

dataLayer.store: Replace lib/data/store.ts JSON file I/O with Drizzle ORM queries against the existing 7-table Postgres schema — the schema already exists and should become the single source of truth

authentication.theming: Use Clerk appearance API to fully restyle SignIn/SignUp components with project tokens — never ship default Clerk theme
authentication.protection: Middleware protects all routes except /sign-in* and /sign-up*
authentication.fix: Delete app/(auth)/sign-in/page.tsx and app/(auth)/sign-up/page.tsx; keep only app/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx and app/sign-up/[[...sign-up]]/page.tsx to remove the routing conflict

endpoints: POST /session-window - Start processing session (RTSP stream, YOLOv8, task state machine)
inferenceIntegration.model: YOLOv8, surfaced in /equipment as model version + accuracy badge (mirrors 'YOLO Model v4.2.1 online, Accuracy 98.4%' log entry style)

fixesFromAudit: Remove all French/English mixed copy — all UI copy in English
Remove dead /pressure route from nav; live monitoring lives at /live
Remove unused clerkMiddleware import / empty middleware() export — implement real route matching
Design proper empty states for zero-session, zero-alert, zero-report scenarios instead of leaving panels blank
Add dark mode is explicitly OUT of scope for this pass — ship light app canvas + dark sidebar only, do not build a toggle
